endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/generateCredentials
endpoints.description: Generate keys for a token of a specified container registry.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/scopeMaps
endpoints.description: Lists all the scope maps for the specified container registry.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/scopeMaps/{scopeMapName}
endpoints.description: Gets the properties of the specified scope map.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPEMAPNAME}} with a real scopemapname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/scopeMaps/{scopeMapName}
endpoints.description: Creates a scope map for a container registry with the specified parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPEMAPNAME}} with a real scopemapname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/scopeMaps/{scopeMapName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a scope map from a container registry.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPEMAPNAME}} with a real scopemapname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/scopeMaps/{scopeMapName}
endpoints.description: Updates a scope map with the specified parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPEMAPNAME}} with a real scopemapname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/tokens
endpoints.description: Lists all the tokens for the specified container registry.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{registryName}/tokens/{tokenName}
endpoints.description: Gets the properties of the specified token.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REGISTRYNAME}} with a real registryname. Replace {{TOKENNAME}} with a real tokenname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
